prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 3 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; preserve its exact paper fibers, mineral palette, ink restraint, creek geography and late-afternoon atmosphere, but remove both people, iron pestle, grindstone and foreground reeds
Primary request: the same mountain creek location as the approved sample, empty and ready for separately composited Li Bai and elderly woman cutouts
Scene/backdrop: distant teal mountains, bamboo and weathered rocks, visible horizontal creek-water band across the lower middle, open creek bank on the right
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage with dimensional paper shadows and subtle print misregistration
Composition/framing: wide 16:9; clear standing area left and seated area right; clean upper breathing room and subtitle-safe lower band; no baked-in people or foreground occluders
Lighting/mood: patient late-afternoon calm, cool celadon distance warming gently near the bank
Constraints: no people, human silhouettes, iron pestle, grindstone, written characters, captions, signs, watermark, logos, modern items or border
Avoid: glossy 3D, anime, chibi, photorealism, crowded scenery, text-like marks
